# Vendored XZ Decoder

`xz-decompress.min.js` is version 0.2.3 of
[`httptoolkit/xz-decompress`](https://github.com/httptoolkit/xz-decompress).

It is vendored so the browser VM can load `.bootimage.xz` capsules without a
package manager, build-time bundler, runtime CDN, or native decompression tool.

The bundle's license header records:

- xzwasm by Steve Sanderson: MIT
- xz-embedded by Lasse Collin and Igor Pavlov: public domain
- walloc by Igalia: MIT

Upstream package: `xz-decompress@0.2.3`

Package integrity:
`sha512-O8v6HG8T0PrKBcpyWA13GkSYWFvncwzuzcLx5A7++l3HsE3atmoetXjIxrZ/JV/nbvSZ7WS4+3XvREZuVn+rEA==`
